app.title: Zhijing
app.subtitle: Personal Knowledge Management
workspace.title: What do you want to organize today?
workspace.map.title: Knowledge Map
workspace.map.empty: Select a knowledge base to view the map
workspace.empty.title: Start your first knowledge base
workspace.empty.body: Enter a theme, link, or question above, and Zhijing will automatically generate knowledge cards for you.
library.title: Material Repository
library.subtitle: Collect links, text, and questions into one repository, then parse and organize by status.
library.capturePlaceholder.auto: Paste a note, question, or topic...
library.capturePlaceholder.batch: Paste one source, note, or question per line...
library.deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Delete Materials
library.deleteConfirm.materials: materials. Related cards will be unlinked but not deleted. This action is irreversible.
library.dedupeNotice.hint: groups of duplicate materials. Duplicate materials detected, you can batch merge in the conflict resolver.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure model services, view system status, and manage local data. Key is only sent to local API, page does not store plaintext.
settings.apiKeyPlaceholder.configured: Configured, leave blank to keep using
settings.fallbackToMock: Fallback to Local Mock on Failure
settings.saveSuccess: Model settings saved to local database, persists after restart.
settings.saveFailed: Save failed, please confirm API is running.
settings.clearKeySuccess: Cleared runtime API Key (env variable Key is not affected).
settings.clearKeyFailed: Clear failed, please confirm API is running.
settings.testFailed: Test failed, please confirm API is running.
settings.fallbackHint: Will keep available results when real call fails.
settings.noFallbackHint: Will throw error when real call fails, suitable for debugging.
settings.profilesDesc: Manage multiple model profiles and select the active one for runtime.
settings.noProfiles: No profiles yet. Click the button above to create your first model profile.
settings.systemTransparency.desc: View API connection status, data scale, and recent tasks.
settings.apiOffline: Cannot connect to local API, please start the backend service.
settings.dataControls.desc: Export all data or clear local cache (does not affect server-side data).
settings.exportFailed: Export failed, please confirm API is running.
settings.clearFailed: Failed to clear cache, browser may have disabled localStorage.
cardType.question: Question
